programme.title: 5 Days of War
programme.desc: A renegade American journalist is caught behind enemy lines.

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: California born surfer Mitchell has to spend six months in Ohio while learning love is where the heart is.

programme.title: The Great Buck Howard
programme.desc: Troy drops out of law school to apprentice for Buck Howard, an illusionist whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-FBI Agent and an ex-mob lawyer have to put aside their rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Best friends accidentally become closer than they ever expected when one of them decides to have a baby.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: To win a bet, an eccentric British inventor embarks on a trip around the world in exactly eighty days.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A pair of aging stickup men try to get the old gang back together for one last hurrah.

programme.title: Deano and Nige's Best Last Day Ever
programme.desc: A man seeks help from his former best friend after he accidentally kills a hitchhiker with his car.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State: The Rise of Thadland
programme.desc: Alex throws Thad the party of his dreams in an effort to get him to buy Goat House.

programme.title: An Actor Prepares
programme.desc: After suffering a heart attack, an actor is forced to drive across country with his estranged son.

programme.title: 7 Chinese Brothers
programme.desc: An unmotivated thirty-something slacker lands a job at a Quick Lube to be close to the beautiful manager.

programme.title: Clerks II
programme.desc: A calamity at Dante and Randall's shops sends them looking for new jobs, but they end up at a fast-food chain.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
